message:
feat(types): add TypeRegistry::with_capacity constructor for caller-controlled sizing

Adds `TypeRegistry::with_capacity(capacity)` so callers who know their
type population upfront can avoid the default capacity heuristic.
`TypeRegistry::new()` now delegates to `with_capacity(DEFAULT_TYPE_REGISTRY_CAPACITY)`.

Includes test `test_type_registry_with_capacity_registration` verifying
that a capacity-1 registry correctly accepts and retrieves a registration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
